title: Personio Jobs Scraper
description: Discover and scrape jobs from all Personio-powered company job boards. Finds companies automatically via Common Crawl indexes, then scrapes their public job listings via the Personio XML API.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description:
How to find companies to scrape.
- **all**: Auto-discover companies from Common Crawl + scrape all of them
- **companies**: Scrape only the specified company slugs
- **search**: Scrape specified companies and apply filters

companies.title: Company Slugs
companies.description: Company slugs to scrape (used in 'companies' and 'search' modes). The slug is the company identifier in the Personio URL, e.g. 'acme' from acme.jobs.personio.de

locationFilter.title: Location Filter
locationFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by location (e.g. 'Berlin|Prague|Remote')
locationFilter.sectionDescription: Optional regex filters to narrow down results. Applied after scraping.

departmentFilter.title: Department Filter
departmentFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by department (e.g. 'Engineering|Product')

officeFilter.title: Office Filter
officeFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by office (e.g. 'Berlin|London')

keywordFilter.title: Keyword Filter
keywordFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by title or content (e.g. 'Senior|Lead|Staff')

seniorityFilter.title: Seniority Filter
seniorityFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by seniority level (e.g. 'Senior|Lead|Principal')

employmentTypeFilter.title: Employment Type Filter
employmentTypeFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by employment type (e.g. 'permanent|full.time')

includeContent.title: Include Job Descriptions
includeContent.description: Include full HTML job descriptions in the output. Increases data size.

concurrency.title: Concurrency
concurrency.description: Number of companies to scrape in parallel

maxCompanies.title: Max Companies
maxCompanies.description: Limit the number of companies to scrape (0 = no limit, useful for testing)
